serializability_notes: Transactions are generated in ascending txn id order.
Predicate domain keys inventory_onhand_* are initialized once and never updated after init.
Every predicate read returns the complete matching result set for the frozen predicate domain.
Mutable high-intensity reads/writes target inventory_reserved_*, inventory_restock_*, inventory_demand_*, and shipment_slot_*.
Session order is consistent with ascending txn id order.
